description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and includes a global before_script that runs docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY, installs python and docker-compose via apk, runs docker info, creates a webproxy network, checks docker-compose version, makes an apps directory and copies .env.dist to .env. Define stages build, release, deploy. Add a build job in the build stage that runs only on the master branch, is tagged with docker, and executes docker-compose build, docker-compose up -d, and docker-compose ps. Add a deploy:production job in the deploy stage that runs only on master, is manual, uses the ruby:latest image, runs a before_script that installs ssh-agent, starts the agent, adds the $DEPLOYMENT_PRIVATE_KEY, configures SSH to skip host key checking, runs bundle install, then runs cap production deploy, and sets the environment name to production with URL https://quentinrillet.fr.
